LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOSEPH TORRANO'S HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (RE WHY RECEIVER SHOULD NOT BE APPOINTED). THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - HEARING CONTINUED TO JANUARY 14, 2011. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE TO PLAINTIFF AN ACCOUNTING OF THE RENTS AND PROFITS THAT ARE IN THE SEGREGATED ACCOUNT BY DECEMBER 17, 2010. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING INSPECTION DATE FOR THE PROPERTY AND INSPECTION TO OCCUR BY DECEMBER 30, 2010. DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE TO PLAINTIFF COPIES OF STATEMENTS AND/OR CANCELLED CHECKS MADE TO THE SENIOR LENDER BY DECEMBER 17, 2010. DEFENDANT TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF REGARDING THESE ISSUES BY JANUARY 5, 2011 AND PLAINTIFF TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY BY JANUARY 12, 2011. BRIEFS ARE TO BE NO MORE THAN 5 PAGES AND ALL PARTIES TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES WITH DEPARTMENT 302. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR #2542
